title: Adelonema kvistii
taxonomy: Adelonema kvistii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Adelonema. The species is native to Madagascar and has been classified based on its unique characteristics and morphological features. Adelonema kvistii is closely related to other species within the Gesneriaceae family, which includes a diverse range of plants. The classification of Adelonema kvistii provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
